SEARCH
Package server.control

Class PricingService

java.lang.Object
server.control.PricingService
public class PricingService extends Object
Computes the price of a reservation, in the same unit as reservation.price_cents. Stateless and pure: the result depends only on the arguments, so a single shared instance is safe across all client threads.

The five pricing tiers (the booking flow only reaches the two pre-ordered ones; the casual tiers are for walk-in Entry/Exit handled in a later session):

  1. Individual/family, pre-ordered — 15% off.
  2. Individual/family, casual — full price.
  3. Group, pre-ordered — 25% off, plus a further 12% off when paid in advance; the guide is not charged (one person drops off the paying count).
  4. Group, casual — 10% off; the guide pays like everyone else.
  5. Member — an extra 10% off that stacks additively on top of whichever tier above applies.

The discounts are expressed as plain if/else arithmetic rather than a table or stream pipeline so each tier can be read off the code line by line.

  • Method Details

    • calculate

      public int calculate(common.dto.VisitType visitType, boolean isGroup, int partySize, boolean preOrdered, boolean prePaid, boolean isMember)
      Computes the total price for a party.

      Two independent adjustments are combined:

      • Paying count — everyone in the party pays, except that a pre-ordered group does not pay for its guide, so one person is dropped (floored at 0 for the degenerate guide-only party).
      • Discount — the per-tier fraction described on the class, with the member bonus added on top.
      Parameters:
      visitType - the visit category; INDIVIDUAL and FAMILY share the same rates, GROUP is identified through isGroup
      isGroup - whether this booking is an organised (guide-led) group
      partySize - number of people in the party (guide included)
      preOrdered - whether the visit was booked ahead (vs. a casual walk-in)
      prePaid - whether the booking is paid in advance (only deepens the discount for a pre-ordered group)
      isMember - whether the owning visitor holds a subscription
      Returns:
      the total price in cents (same unit as price_cents)
